notes: malformed %x, %x0 and %xzz pretty-format escapes are preserved as literal text by stock Git and Zmin
missing %C, %G, %g, %a and %c pretty-format prefix atoms are preserved as literal text by stock Git and Zmin
unterminated %C(, %C(red and %C(always,red pretty-format color atoms are preserved as literal text by stock Git and Zmin
invalid forced color atoms such as %C(always,bad) exit 1 with stock invalid color diagnostics
malformed %<(bad), %<() and %< pretty-format width atoms are preserved as literal text while following atoms are still rendered by stock Git and Zmin
valid %<(...) and %>(...) width atoms with no following target atom exit 0 with empty stdout/stderr like stock Git
plain %w and malformed %w(...) atoms are preserved as literal text; valid %w(width[,indent1[,indent2]]) wraps following pretty-format output like stock Git
reflog selector atoms and stash subject atoms match stock Git for multiple stash entries
author, committer, parent and tree atoms in stash list output match stock Git
default, ISO and strict ISO author/committer date atoms in stash list output match stock Git
message body, sanitized subject, decoration, notes, left/right mark and source atoms in stash list output match stock Git
RFC2822 dates, short dates and email local-part atoms in stash list output match stock Git
GPG status/key/fingerprint/trust atoms and reflog key atom in stash list output match stock Git
reflog selector identity atoms for stash list match stock Git output for mailmap-aware and raw reflog names/emails
GPG signer and raw verification-message atoms in stash list output match stock Git
unknown pretty-format atoms used by stash list are preserved as stock-compatible literal output
unknown reflog-prefixed atoms in stash list output are preserved as stock-compatible literal output
unknown author, committer and GPG-prefixed atoms in stash list output are preserved as stock-compatible literal output
human and relative author/committer date atoms in stash list output match stock Git with a fixed oracle clock
named, parenthesized, auto and always color atoms in stash list output match stock Git
left/right alignment plus right, left and middle truncation width atoms in stash list output match stock Git
unknown apply option exits 129 with stock usage text instead of a fatal unsupported-option diagnostic
unknown drop option exits 129 with stock usage text instead of a fatal unsupported-option diagnostic
unknown pop option exits 129 with stock usage text instead of a fatal unsupported-option diagnostic
